```{r}
#| label: git-push-robust
#| echo: true


# A list or vector to store any failures for a final report
failed_repos <- list()

for (dir in repo_dirs) {
  if (!dir.exists(dir)) {
    message(paste("Skipping (Directory not found):", dir))
    next
  }
  
  message(paste("Processing:", dir))
  
  # Run git push, capturing both standard output and errors
  result <- system2("git", args = c("-C", dir, "push", "origin", "main"), 
                    stdout = TRUE, stderr = TRUE)
  
  # Check if the command returned a non-zero exit status
  exit_status <- attr(result, "status")
  
  if (!is.null(exit_status)) {
    message(paste("❌ Git push failed for:", dir))
    
    # Store the directory and the error message context
    failed_repos[[dir]] <- result
  } else {
    message(paste("✅ Git push succeeded for:", dir))
  }
}

# --- Post-loop Summary ---
if (length(failed_repos) > 0) {
  message("\n--- Summary of Failures ---")
  for (repo in names(failed_repos)) {
    cat(paste0("\nRepository: ", repo, "\nError Output:\n"))
    cat(failed_repos[[repo]], sep = "\n")
  }
} else {
  message("\nAll repositories processed successfully!")
}
